name: Madison Technologies Inc.
summary: Madison Technologies Inc. focuses on developing a line of Luxurie Legs products. It offers luxury shaving regiment for women under the Casa Zeta-Jones brand name through an online subscription as a club model format. The company offers its products through e-commerce websites. The company was formerly known as Madison Explorations, Inc. and changed its name to Madison Technologies Inc. in March 2015. Madison Technologies Inc. was incorporated in 1998 and is based in New York, New York.
